name: Lemon Marinated Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boned and skinned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a glass dish, combine the lemon juice, chicken broth, olive oil, oregano, and bay leaf.
2. Add the chicken breasts to the marinade and turn to coat evenly.
3. Allow the chicken to marinate for 2 hours.
4. Preheat the broiler or place the grill 4-5 inches from the heat source.
5. Cook the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it is thoroughly cooked.
6. Makes 4 servings.
